title: begonia × hortensis
intro: Begonia × hortensis, also known as the wheat flower begonia, is a hybrid ornamental plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family and is native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Begonia × hortensis are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
